name: Chehalem Aquatic and Fitness Center
description: Chehalem Aquatic and Fitness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Newberg, OR. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints - McMinnville
description: Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints - McMinnville is a place to play pickleball in McMinnville, OR. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

name: George Fox Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at George Fox Tennis Center in Newberg, OR! There are 2 indoor hard courts. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Jaquith Park
description: New orange permanent lines for 12 unlighted courts at the  Chehalem Parks and Recreation District Jaquith Park tennis courts.   Newberg Pickleball Club (NPC) supplies nets and balls for all club members.  Drop ins are welcome and  pay $2. per visit for equipment.  NPC is an chapter of the Columbia River Pickleball Club (CRPC) so any CRPC members can play for no charge. Daily group play starts about 1 hour after sunrise MWF and goes until 11 AM.   Playtime Scheduler for  Pickleball shows this and other time slots for intended play.

name: McMinnville City Park
description: McMinnville City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in McMinnville, OR. There are 10 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: McMinnville Community Center
description: McMinnville Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in McMinnville, OR. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Sue Buel elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Sue Buel elementary School in McMinnville, OR! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Wine Country Pickleball Newberg
description: Wine Country Pickleball Newberg is a place to play pickleball in Newberg, OR. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like lights.
